ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" TEXT /* Survival status of the passenger (Yes/No) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, 3) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger (Male/Female) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cabin number */,
  "embarked_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the embarkation point */,
  "home_dest" TEXT /* Destination of the passenger after the voyage */,
  "is_alone" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the passenger is traveling alone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_id") REFERENCES embarked ("embarked_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES passenger_class ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES gender ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabin ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_survived FOREIGN KEY ("survived") REFERENCES survival_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck_number" INTEGER /* Deck number of the cabin */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Deck name of the cabin */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cabin on the ship */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarked" (
  "embarked_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "embarked_point" TEXT /* Code for the embarkation point */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the embarkation point is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the embarkation point is located */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Port code for the embarkation point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the embarkation point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the embarkation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarked_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family relationship */,
  "passenger_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first passenger in the relationship */,
  "passenger_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second passenger in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, parent, child) */,
  "relationship_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship began */,
  "relationship_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id_1") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id_2") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival status (Yes/No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survival status */,
  "survival_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the survival status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_class" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger class (1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the passenger class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the passenger class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (Male/Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who received the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was issued */,
  "issue_location" TEXT /* Location where the ticket was issued */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., one-way, round-trip) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "purchase_location" TEXT /* Location where the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the passenger */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the passenger */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Language spoken by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_profiles_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "audit_author" TEXT /* Author of the audit event */,
  "audit_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description for the audit event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
